label: Batch Search File Names
description: Run multiple file-name searches in one call.

function.name: batch_search_files
function.description: Run multiple file-name searches in a single call. Each query searches vault file names/paths independently. Use this when you need to search for several different terms at once instead of calling search_files repeatedly.

queries.description: A JSON array of search query strings. Example: ["meeting notes", "project plan", "2024"]
